cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
project(ascendc_complex_gram LANGUAGES CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

option(COMPLEX_GRAM_BUILD_HOST_TILING "Build standalone host tiling calculator" ON)

if(COMPLEX_GRAM_BUILD_HOST_TILING)
  add_executable(complex_gram_tiling op_host/complex_gram_tiling.cpp)
  target_compile_definitions(complex_gram_tiling PRIVATE COMPLEX_GRAM_TILING_STANDALONE)
endif()

# In a real Ascend CANN custom-op project, compile op_kernel/complex_gram_fused.cpp
# with the AscendC compiler/toolchain generated by msOpGen or the official samples.
# This CMake file only builds the portable host tiling helper on machines without CANN.
